# commpage

```text
usage: commpage [-h] [-v]

```

Dumps all values from the macOS commpage.
### Optional arguments

|Short|Long|Help|
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
|-h|--help|show this help message and exit|
|-v|--verbose|Print detailed information.|
